qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Incomplete UNSAFE_MODULES blocklist allows dangerous imports to bypass safety checks
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same vulnerable blocklist in fickling/analysis.py and same missing runpy/run_module/run_path unsafe import class as the advisory; the finding explicitly lists runpy as an omitted dangerous module.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded stack pop operations cause denial of service via crafted pickle files
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code and root cause: this finding concerns unbounded stack operations in fickling/fickle.py opcode handlers, not the missing runpy unsafe-import blocklist entry in fickling/analysis.py.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Warning messages expose internal pickle structure and module names to stdout/stderr
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code and root cause: this finding concerns stdout/stderr warning disclosure in STACK_GLOBAL, CLI error handling, and memo warnings, not the runpy unsafe-import bypass in fickling/analysis.py.

selected_finding.title: Incomplete UNSAFE_MODULES blocklist allows dangerous imports to bypass safety checks

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding identifies the same incomplete unsafe-import blocklist root cause as GHSA-wfq2-52f7-7qvj and explicitly includes runpy as a missing dangerous module. The copied advisory-specific PoC against Fickling 0.1.6 shows a runpy.run_path pickle is classified as SUSPICIOUS with only UnusedVariables reported, then pickle loading executes attacker-controlled script code and creates the marker file.
evidence: /Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-GLM/dataset/advisory/testing/2026-01/GHSA-wfq2-52f7-7qvj/GHSA-wfq2-52f7-7qvj.json: advisory states runpy is missing from fickling/analysis.py unsafe imports and runpy.run_path/run_module payloads are classified SUSPICIOUS instead of OVERTLY_MALICIOUS.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_6f3f1918/vuln_allowlist_bypass/vulnerability_report.json: finding reports incomplete UNSAFE_MODULES in fickling/analysis.py and lists runpy/run_module among missing execution-capable modules.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_6f3f1918/.judge/poc_runs/vuln_allowlist_bypass/run.log: probe used Fickling 0.1.6, payload_global=runpy.run_path, check_safety_severity=SUSPICIOUS, detailed_results only UnusedVariables, marker_exists=True, and ADVISORY_EXPLOIT_SUCCESS.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_6f3f1918/.judge/poc_runs/vuln_allowlist_bypass/evidence/runpy_probe_result.json: retained JSON evidence records severity SUSPICIOUS, classified_as_bypass=true, unsafe_imports_mentions_runpy=false, and marker_exists_after_pickle_load=true.

poc_executions.command: bash -lc 'rm -rf target-repo evidence && git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 -c http.postBuffer=104857600 clone --branch v0.1.6 https://github.com/trailofbits/fickling.git target-repo && PYTHONPATH=target-repo /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 advisory_runpy_probe.py'
poc_executions.observed_effect: Fickling 0.1.6 classified the runpy.run_path pickle as SUSPICIOUS with only UnusedVariables reported; loading the same pickle executed the attacker-controlled script and created the marker content 'runpy code execution reached'.
